title: A Layover in Bangkok
description: A quick stop in Bangkok between trips. The city is loud, hot, and alive — and the rooftop pools don't hurt either.
coverAlt: Rooftop infinity pool overlooking the Bangkok skyline under a cloudy sky

images.alt: Rooftop infinity pool with water reflecting the Bangkok cityscape, skyscrapers and low-rise buildings stretching to the horizon under scattered clouds
images.caption: The view from a rooftop pool — Bangkok sprawling out in every direction.
